description: Live cross-validation of mlsynth TASC vs the authors' TimeAwareSC (srho1/tasc, Rho et al., AISTATS 2026, arXiv:2601.03099) on the California Prop 99 panel: target counterfactual path, ATT, pre-period RMSE, and fitted pre-period log-likelihood at d=2.

reference.impl: srho1/tasc TimeAwareSC (vendored under vendor/; em_pre, naive init)
reference.paper: Rho, Illick, Narasipura, Abadie, Hsu & Misra (2026), Time-Aware Synthetic Control, AISTATS 2026, arXiv:2601.03099
